text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Fading EV demand (Tesla's drop) suggests caution, but big names are still buying tech. The underlying driver is a tug-of-war between growth skepticism and long-term tech confidence, creating volatility.

Your holdings: SOXL (-31.27%) is a deep loss on a leveraged product and flagged 'SELL'. QQQI (-2.23%) is flagged for 'TRIM'. SPAL (-11.53%) and PTNM (-15.25%) are new, volatile, and also showing losses. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a very close eye on your SOXL stop. Also, watch SMH for potential accumulation given its scanner signal and general tech interest.

Bottom line: Tighten up risk management on leveraged positions and be highly selective with new entries in this mixed tech environment.
plays: Respect your SOXL stop at 200 or re-evaluate this leveraged 'SELL' position given the -31.27% loss.
Consider trimming QQQI per its 'TRIM' status, especially if you need to free up capital or reduce exposure.
Consider accumulating SMH (current holding) at the scanner's entry of 584.52-583.66, with a stop at 580.87, aligning with positive tech sentiment.
